title: galium commune var. thuillieri
intro: Galium commune var. thuillieri, also known as the woods-beak or woods bedstraw, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant contains flavonoids and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Galium commune var. thuillieri have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support immune function.
